name: Apprentice Lyris
who:
Talented young mage of the Arcane Circle
Top of her class in elemental magic
Eager to prove herself beyond the library
Potential companion upon completing circle questline
Mentored directly by Archmage Elara
what:
Circle's promising apprentice and field researcher
Elemental magic specialist
Offers training in arcane fundamentals
Potential companion if chosen over Zephyr
where:
Dalhurst - Arcane Circle Tower
Available as companion after questline completion
quests: Arcane Circle Magus Trial reward choice

sprite.notes: Young woman in mage robes, glowing staff, determined expression

dialogue.notes: Enthusiastic, academic, sometimes overconfident in her abilities

combat.notes: Ranged mage - low HP, high magic damage, support spells

follower.notes: Versatile caster with damage and protection spells
